description: Comprehensive assumption battery for a CSV column: outliers + normality, plus per-group homogeneity of variance when a group column is given.
rules: read-only — input CSV is never mutated
always runs IQR outlier detection + normality on the value column
when GROUP_COL is set: normality is computed per group and Levene's homogeneity test is added
single combined JSON report written to record_store
usage: Set DATA_CSV, VALUE_COL, optionally GROUP_COL (omit/empty for ungrouped) and ALPHA (default 0.05). Output: assumptions.json.
limitation: No figures (numeric report only). Per-group mode needs >= 2 observations per group. Requires numpy/scipy/pandas/matplotlib present; degrades to an empty report otherwise.
